sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2545" key="ai)nodrufh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰνο-δρυφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n2545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sadly torn</tr_>, in sign of mourning, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:[107]" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">[107]</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
